User.title: User
User.description: A user of the dog walking app.

currentGroupId.description: The ID of the group the user is currently viewing.

Group.title: Group
Group.description: A household or group of roommates sharing a pet.

name.description: The name of the group (e.g. 'The Smith House').

ownerUid.description: The UID of the person who created the group.

members.description: List of UIDs of users in this group.

Walk.title: Walk
Walk.description: A log of a dog walk.

groupId.description: The ID of the group this walk belongs to.

walkerUid.description: The UID of the person who walked the dog.

walkerName.description: The name of the person who walked the dog.

didPoop.description: Whether the dog pooped during the walk.

didPee.description: Whether the dog peed during the walk.

notes.description: Any additional notes about the walk.

groupId.description: The ID of the group this dog belongs to.

photoURL.description: The dog's profile photo URL (base64 or link).

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who last updated the info.

Feeding.title: Feeding
Feeding.description: A log of a dog feeding.

groupId.description: The ID of the group this feeding belongs to.

feederUid.description: The UID of the person who fed the dog.

feederName.description: The name of the person who fed the dog.

amount.description: How much food was given (e.g. 1 cup).

/walks/{walkId}.description: Shared history of dog walks, filtered by groupId.

/feedings/{feedingId}.description: Shared history of dog feedings, filtered by groupId.
